TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Peter_Mutharika, title = Peter_Mutharika, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Peter_Mutharika} }

S.FORM: = Peter Mutharika (ŚĹľŚĺó¬∑Á©ÜŤĖ©ťáĆŚć° = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas jiyax ka Peter Mutharika ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Malawi ta sayang o kiya ka Peter Mutharika, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 5 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Peter Mutharika = Arthur Peter Mutharika (Kari Ingkoku: Arthur Peter Mutharika, phnang kari Ingkoku: //mut į√°rika//; kngkawas 1940-), Malawi seyji jnwu, swayi brah soto Bingu Wa Mutharika, kngkawas 2012 prading ngalan tunux tang Mincu Cinpu Tang, mnngalan qqpahun Shwabu Bucyo, Kyoilibu Bucyo, Wacyawbu Bucyo uri, kngkawas 2014 idas 5 diyax 21, Peter Mutharika pa wada mbiyax mangal soto seyngkyo, mntna kngkawas idas 5 diyax 31 muda psdhuwan phiyu qnlhangan Malawi Tu5 Soto. Kngkawas 2019 idas 5 diyax 21, Peter Mutharika u mniq mntxal kcka pprngawan kari na knbeyhing seyngkyo pkla kari wada mbiyax mangal soto Dungan, binaw Malawi tubaraw balay hoying pa mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 2 diyax 3 muda pswau uka dungus niya ka lmutuc mangal, hiti daw Peter Mutharika u mniq mntna kngkawas idas 5 diyax 28 mntxal muda knbeyhing seyngkyo Soto cida wada ini baka ka hiya, kiya mi so babaw niya idas daw malix qpahun niya Soto. Kngkawas 2021 idas 8, keyngpo hoying u muda singsa Peter Mutharika Mincu Cinpu Tang pnusa dha patas sangsu. Pusa kari ka hiya palix ka kngkawas 2020 Soto seyngkyo, alaw 4 hiyi dayhyo niya u wada htran tumal Seyngkyo Yingkay.
S.PHON: = p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika (******* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas …üijax ka p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan malawi ta sajaŇč o kija ka p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika = a…ĺtńßu…ĺ p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika (ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: a…ĺtńßu…ĺ p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika, pńßnaŇč ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: //mut**…ĺika//; kŇčkawas ****-), malawi s…ô…üi …ünwu, swaji b…ĺańß soto biŇču wa mutńßa…ĺika, kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan tunux taŇč min ¶u ¶inpu taŇč, mnŇčalan qqpańßun sńßwabu bu ¶jo, kjoilibu bu ¶jo, wa ¶jawbu bu ¶jo u…ĺi, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika pa wada mbijax maŇčal soto s…ôŇčkjo, mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax ** muda psdńßuwan pńßiju qnlńßaŇčan malawi tu* soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika u mniq mntxal k ¶ka pp…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi na knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo pkla ka…ĺi wada mbijax maŇčal soto duŇčan, binaw malawi tuba…ĺaw balaj ńßojiŇč pa mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * muda pswau uka duŇčus nija ka lmutu ¶ maŇčal, ńßiti daw p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika u mniq mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax ** mntxal muda knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida wada ini baka ka ńßija, kija mi so babaw nija idas daw malix qpańßun nija soto. kŇčkawas **** idas *, k…ôŇčpo ńßojiŇč u muda siŇčsa p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika min ¶u ¶inpu taŇč pnusa dńßa patas saŇčsu. pusa ka…ĺi ka ńßija palix ka kŇčkawas **** soto s…ôŇčkjo, alaw * ńßiji dajńßjo nija u wada ńßt…ĺan tumal s…ôŇčkjo jiŇčkaj.
S.FORM: = Peter Mutharika (ŚĹľŚĺó¬∑Á©ÜŤĖ©ťáĆŚć° = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas jiyax ka Peter Mutharika ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Malawi ta sayang o kiya ka Peter Mutharika, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 5 jiyax 31 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Peter Mutharika = Arthur Peter Mutharika (Kari Ingkoku: Arthur Peter Mutharika, phnang kari Ingkoku: //mut į√°rika//; kngkawas 1940-), Malawi seyji jnwu, swayi brah soto Bingu Wa Mutharika, kngkawas 2012 prading ngalan tunux tang Mincu Cinpu Tang, mnngalan qqpahun Shwabu Bucyo, Kyoilibu Bucyo, Wacyawbu Bucyo uri, kngkawas 2014 idas 5 diyax 21, Peter Mutharika pa wada mbiyax mangal soto seyngkyo, mntna kngkawas idas 5 diyax 31 muda psdhuwan phiyu qnlhangan Malawi Tu5 Soto. Kngkawas 2019 idas 5 diyax 21, Peter Mutharika u mniq mntxal kcka pprngawan kari na knbeyhing seyngkyo pkla kari wada mbiyax mangal soto Dungan, binaw Malawi tubaraw balay hoying pa mniq kngkawas 2020 idas 2 diyax 3 muda pswau uka dungus niya ka lmutuc mangal, hiti daw Peter Mutharika u mniq mntna kngkawas idas 5 diyax 28 mntxal muda knbeyhing seyngkyo Soto cida wada ini baka ka hiya, kiya mi so babaw niya idas daw malix qpahun niya Soto. Kngkawas 2021 idas 8, keyngpo hoying u muda singsa Peter Mutharika Mincu Cinpu Tang pnusa dha patas sangsu. Pusa kari ka hiya palix ka kngkawas 2020 Soto seyngkyo, alaw 4 hiyi dayhyo niya u wada htran tumal Seyngkyo Yingkay.
S.PHON: = p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika (******* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas …üijax ka p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan malawi ta sajaŇč o kija ka p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika = a…ĺtńßu…ĺ p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika (ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: a…ĺtńßu…ĺ p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika, pńßnaŇč ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: //mut**…ĺika//; kŇčkawas ****-), malawi s…ô…üi …ünwu, swaji b…ĺańß soto biŇču wa mutńßa…ĺika, kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan tunux taŇč min ¶u ¶inpu taŇč, mnŇčalan qqpańßun sńßwabu bu ¶jo, kjoilibu bu ¶jo, wa ¶jawbu bu ¶jo u…ĺi, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika pa wada mbijax maŇčal soto s…ôŇčkjo, mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax ** muda psdńßuwan pńßiju qnlńßaŇčan malawi tu* soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika u mniq mntxal k ¶ka pp…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi na knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo pkla ka…ĺi wada mbijax maŇčal soto duŇčan, binaw malawi tuba…ĺaw balaj ńßojiŇč pa mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * muda pswau uka duŇčus nija ka lmutu ¶ maŇčal, ńßiti daw p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika u mniq mntna kŇčkawas idas * dijax ** mntxal muda knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida wada ini baka ka ńßija, kija mi so babaw nija idas daw malix qpańßun nija soto. kŇčkawas **** idas *, k…ôŇčpo ńßojiŇč u muda siŇčsa p…ôt…ô…ĺ mutńßa…ĺika min ¶u ¶inpu taŇč pnusa dńßa patas saŇčsu. pusa ka…ĺi ka ńßija palix ka kŇčkawas **** soto s…ôŇčkjo, alaw * ńßiji dajńßjo nija u wada ńßt…ĺan tumal s…ôŇčkjo jiŇčkaj.
